input-sensitivity: none (algorithm spec only; no secrets, PII, paths, telemetry)
decision: REVIEWED, ADOPTED-WITH-FIXES. Two bugs found in draft and corrected in final: (1) topoOrder built its exclusion set from unknownDeps(...).missing (the missing target ids) instead of the ids of packages that HAVE unknown deps; (2) Tarjan SCC reused the `index` variable already consumed by the enclosing pkgs.forEach loop, corrupting discovery indices. Final hand-authored module re-implements both correctly and adds deterministic tie-breaking by input order.
